Quick Setup

Launch

Wallets

Paste

Buy/Sell

Track

Get your WagieBot up and running in seconds. Send a message to the bot for instant access. No registration required.

Specialized Features

Sniping

Featuring Method Sniping & Liquidity Sniping with Block Delays, Dead Blocks, Bribing, Anti-Rug and more. Set up your sniper and be amongst the first on any new token launch.

Learn more

Copy Trading

Automatically copy the trades of anyone on any of the supoorted chains. Adjust your settings and mimick every move the address you're copying makes.

Learn more

Anti-Mev

Avoid sandwich and front running bots with Wagie's built-in Anti-Mev protection. Send private transactions with high slippage without losing money.

Learn more

Limit Orders

Profit from volatility on the go. Get your perfect entries using Wagie's Limit Orders.

Learn more

Advanced SL/TP

Create Advanced Stop-Loss and Take-Profits presets or use custom settings per trade basis. Wagie will check if your order is nearing SL/TP every block.

Learn more

Support

Description: Should any questions arise, our dedicated support staff is always ready to take care of any issues.

Learn more

Your DeFi Helper

WagieBot tokens reduce your fees by up to 60%, enhance your bot's abilities accross all features, give access to our private alpha and more.

Competition

Cutting-Edge Technology

WagieBot utilizes a custom-built architecture capable of handling tens of thousands requests per second bundled with a powerful infrastructure consisting of private nodes and self-hosted adapters, making it the fastest bot on the market.

GMX.io
